display.purpose: Homepage headline and major brand statements.

label.purpose: Agent traces, metadata, code labels, and warning codes.

motion.name: ease-out
motion.purpose: Small hover, press, and disclosure transitions.

motion.name: duration-ui
motion.purpose: Page shell color and border transitions.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The rare primary path: use with an agent, verify, or commit a clear action.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary{min-height:40px;padding:0 12px;border:1px solid color-mix(in srgb,#9A4A24 42%,#D8D0C1);border-radius:8px;background:#9A4A24;color:#F5F0E4;font:700 0.8125rem Avenir Next,Segoe UI,system-ui,sans-serif}.ds-btn-primary:hover{background:#6b321c}.ds-btn-primary:focus-visible{outline:2px solid #9A4A24;outline-offset:3px}

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: A quieter route to editor, docs, install, or local setup.

components.name: Agent Prompt Card
components.description: Copy-first agent handoff with collapsible long-form prompt text.
components.html:
Agent prompt
Create or edit a Mermaid diagram...
components.css: .ds-prompt-card{overflow:hidden;border:1px solid #D8D0C1;border-radius:12px;background:#EDE7DB;color:#221E16}.ds-prompt-bar{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;gap:12px;align-items:center;min-height:52px;padding:7px 8px 7px 14px;border-bottom:1px solid #D8D0C1}.ds-prompt-bar strong{font:650 0.8125rem SFMono-Regular,Menlo,monospace;color:#5D5345}.ds-prompt-bar button{min-height:40px;border:1px solid #BBAF9F;border-radius:8px;background:#EDE7DB;color:#3F382C;font-weight:700}.ds-prompt-card pre{margin:0;padding:15px 18px;white-space:pre-wrap;overflow-wrap:break-word}

components.name: Warning Badge
components.description: Triage label that pairs color with explicit tier/severity text.

narrative.northStar: A standards manual attached to a capable workbench.
narrative.overview: Agentic Mermaid’s public site is a document-first brand surface for engineers, documentation authors, and coding agents. It should feel precise, calm, and mechanically trustworthy: a readable manual with enough workbench affordance that visitors can immediately copy an agent prompt, open the editor, install locally, or inspect the machine-readable contract.
keyCharacteristics: Sparse Paper-and-ink surface with one terracotta action accent and an isolated pine logo mark.
Serif headings for manual authority; system/humanist sans for controls and prose; mono only for code, labels, and traces.
Flat panels with hairline borders, not glossy cards or SaaS shadows.
Concrete diagrams, commands, warnings, and source snippets instead of AI-magic claims.

rules.name: The Local-First Honesty Rule
rules.body: Color may highlight local commands, warnings, and agent routes, but it must never imply a hosted execution surface.

rules.name: The Isolated Mark Rule
rules.body: Brand mark tokens are isolated from renderer themes and page scheme tokens.

rules.name: The Trace Is Type Rule
rules.body: Agent traces and warning codes use mono because they are machine artifacts, not decoration.

rules.name: The Artifact First Rule
rules.body: Rendered diagrams and source blocks are the visual evidence.

dos: Do lead with the honest action order when appropriate: Use with an agent, Try editor, Install locally.
Do show real Mermaid source, rendered output, warnings, and traces as the proof layer.
Do keep local-first boundaries visible near MCP and Code Mode language.
donts: Don't make the site look like a generic SaaS landing page with card grids, glass panels, glowing AI gradients, loud hero metrics, or overbearing CTAs.
Don't imply hosted Code Mode, arbitrary execution, or a production render API.
Don't hide core editor controls on mobile; adapt them so Source, Preview, Diagram, Unicode, ASCII, zoom, pan, copy, export, settings, examples, and theme remain reachable.
